title: Accessible Showers
metaTitle: Accessible Showers - Aging in Place Remodeling
metaDescription: Aging-In-Place Remodeling is an accessible showers & bathroom specialist, creating showers that make our clients feel comfortable and secure while bathing.
intro: We specialize in accessible shower and bathroom remodeling, having completed hundreds of bathroom renovations. We primarily replace existing tubs or showers with barrier-free shower options and can eliminate thresholds that create safety concerns. Our designs benefit both users and caregivers assisting with bathing.

subServices.name: Tile Roll-In Showers
subServices.description: A properly designed roll-in shower can be a game-changer for many people. When the shower floor and the bathroom floor are level with each other, no barrier exists.

subServices.name: Fiberglass Roll-In Showers
subServices.description: Fiberglass systems for clients wanting rapid transformation of bathtubs or high-threshold showers into low or no-threshold options, often completed in a single day.

subServices.name: Threshold Replacement
subServices.description: An alternative where existing showers can be modified by replacing only the threshold, offering quicker completion and lower costs while maintaining the existing shower structure.

subServices.name: Wet Room
subServices.description: Essentially a large shower that has a toilet and vanity in it, with waterproofed surfaces and central drains — the ultimate accessible shower.
